revision.text:
'''己酉'''（つちのととり、きゆう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて46番目で、前は[[戊申]]、次は[[庚戌]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は金で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（土生金）である。
==己酉の年==
==己酉の日== ===[[選日]]===

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''己酉'''（つちのととり、きどのとり、きゆう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの46番目で、前は[[戊申]]、次は[[庚戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==己酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って49が余る年が己酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[49年]] *[[109年]] *[[169年]] *[[229年]] *[[289年]] *[[349年]] *[[409年]] *[[469年]] *[[529年]] *[[589年]] *[[649年]] *[[709年]] *[[769年]] *[[829年]] *[[889年]] *[[949年]] | *[[1009年]] *[[1069年]] *[[1129年]] *[[1189年]] *[[1249年]] *[[1309年]] *[[1369年]] *[[1429年]] *[[1489年]] *[[1549年]] *[[1609年]] *[[1669年]] *[[1729年]] *[[1789年]] *[[1849年]] *[[1909年]] *[[1969年]] | *[[2029年]] *[[2089年]] *[[2149年]] *[[2209年]] *[[2269年]] *[[2329年]] *[[2389年]] *[[2449年]] *[[2509年]] *[[2569年]] *[[2629年]] *[[2689年]] *[[2749年]] *[[2809年]] *[[2869年]] *[[2929年]] *[[2989年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[慶長]]14年（1609年） - [[己酉約条]]（己酉条約・慶長条約）を締結。
==己酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[8月]]が己酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己酉の日== ===選択=== ===2===
==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのととり}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:己酉]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:己酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:己酉]]

{{干支}} '''己酉'''（つちのととり、きどのとり、きゆう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの46番目で、前は[[戊申]]、次は[[庚戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==己酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って49が余る年が己酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[49年]] *[[109年]] *[[169年]] *[[229年]] *[[289年]] *[[349年]] *[[409年]] *[[469年]] *[[529年]] *[[589年]] *[[649年]] *[[709年]] *[[769年]] *[[829年]] *[[889年]] *[[949年]] | *[[1009年]] *[[1069年]] *[[1129年]] *[[1189年]] *[[1249年]] *[[1309年]] *[[1369年]] *[[1429年]] *[[1489年]] *[[1549年]] *[[1609年]] *[[1669年]] *[[1729年]] *[[1789年]] *[[1849年]] *[[1909年]] *[[1969年]] | *[[2029年]] *[[2089年]] *[[2149年]] *[[2209年]] *[[2269年]] *[[2329年]] *[[2389年]] *[[2449年]] *[[2509年]] *[[2569年]] *[[2629年]] *[[2689年]] *[[2749年]] *[[2809年]] *[[2869年]] *[[2929年]] *[[2989年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[慶長]]14年（1609年） - [[己酉約条]]（己酉条約・慶長条約）を締結。
==己酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[8月]]が己酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己酉の日== ===選択=== ===2===
==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのととり}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:己酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:己酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:己酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:new pages]] [[ja:己酉]]

{{Sexagenary cycle}} '''Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|戊申}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|庚戌}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Tori|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
== Years of Tsuchinoto-tori == Years in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The {{ill|Keichō era|ja|慶長}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 ===
== Related Topics == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Tsuchinoto-tori]] [[Category:Chinese calendar]] [[ja:己酉]]

== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Rooster also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|戊申}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|庚戌}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Tori|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
== Years of Tsuchinoto-tori == Years in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The {{ill|Keichō era|ja|慶長}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 ===

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Rooster also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|戊申}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|庚戌}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Tori|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
== Years of Tsuchinoto-tori == Years in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The {{ill|Keichō era|ja|慶長}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 ===
== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Tsuchinoto-tori]] [[Category:Chinese calendar]] [[Category:己酉]] [[Category:Qq]] [[ja:己酉]][[zh:己酉]][[ko:기유]][[fr:Coq de terre]][[de:Erde-Hahn]][[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Earth Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:己酉]] [[ja:己酉]][[zh:己酉]][[ko:기유]][[fr:Coq de terre]][[de:Erde-Hahn]] [[af:Vuuros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Feuer-Büffelen]][[en:Fire Ox]][[fr:Buffle de feushak]][[it:Ding-chṳ́id]][[sn:ingmaoja]][[ko:정축]][[nds:Feuer-Büffelvi]][[vi:Đinh Sửu]][[za:Dingceij]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-chik]][[zh-yue:丁丑]][[zh:丁丑]]

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|戊申}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|庚戌}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Tori|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.

== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 ===

== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 ===

== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).

== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 ===

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Rooster also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|戊申}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|庚戌}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支}} {{ill|Tori|ja|酉|1=Rooster (zodiac)|lt=Rooster (酉)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
== Years of Tsuchinoto-tori == Years in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The {{ill|Keichō era|ja|慶長}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 ===

== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 ===== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).

== Years of Tsuchinoto-tori == Years in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦}} that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The {{ill|Keichō era|ja|慶長}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 === == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=draft}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土|12=draft}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branch|ja|十二支|12=draft}} {{ill|Tori|ja|酉|1=Rooster (zodiac)|lt=Rooster (酉)|12=draft}} represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|金|12=draft}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=draft}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
== Years of Tsuchinoto-tori == Years in the {{ill|Common Era|ja|西暦|12=draft}} that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The {{ill|Keichō era|ja|慶長|12=draft}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=draft}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
== Month of Tsuchinoto-tori == In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stem|ja|十干|12=draft}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=draft}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=draft}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} or the {{ill|Solar term|ja|節月|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Hakuro (solar term)|ja|白露|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Kanro|ja|寒露|12=draft}}).
== Day of Tsuchinoto-tori == === Selection === === 2 === == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Rooster also known as Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== PronounciationYin Earth Rooster
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Rooster== === Selection === === 2 === == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[1069]] *[[1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[1189]] *[[1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[1309]] *[[1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[1429]] *[[1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[1549]] *[[1609]] *[[1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[1789]] *[[1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu

--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. --> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[2029]] *[[2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).
