(己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[2209]] *[[2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[2389]] *[[2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

(金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[2929]] *[[2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[589]] *[[649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. <!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[769]] *[[829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[889]] *[[949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[:en:889|889]] *[[:en:949|949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. ==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905305]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Rooster also known as Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[:en:889|889]] *[[:en:949|949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[:en:889|889]] *[[:en:949|949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[:en:889|889]] *[[:en:949|949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle comprehensive)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements generation (Xiangsheng)|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[:en:889|889]] *[[:en:949|949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|qq=|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).
