It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[:en:889|889]] *[[:en:949|949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[:en:889|889]] *[[:en:949|949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).
==Days of Yin Earth Rooster== === Selection === === 2 === == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-iū]][[de:Erde-Hahn]][[hak:Kí-yû]][[ja:己酉]][[ko:기유]][[vi:Kỷ Dậu]][[za:Geijyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-iú]][[zh-yue:己酉]][[zh:己酉]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-iū]][[de:Erde-Hahn]][[hak:Kí-yû]][[ja:己酉]][[ko:기유]][[vi:Kỷ Dậu]][[za:Geijyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-iú]][[zh-yue:己酉]][[zh:己酉]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-iū]][[de:Erde-Hahn]][[hak:Kí-yû]][[ja:己酉]][[ko:기유]][[vi:Kỷ Dậu]][[za:Geijyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-iú]][[zh-yue:己酉]][[zh:己酉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905305]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Rooster also known as Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[:en:889|889]] *[[:en:949|949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Earth Rooster (己酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Rooster== Years in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:49|49]] *[[:en:109|109]] *[[:en:169|169]] *[[:en:229|229]] *[[:en:289|289]] *[[:en:349|349]] *[[:en:409|409]] *[[:en:469|469]] *[[:en:529|529]] *[[:en:589|589]] *[[:en:649|649]] *[[:en:709|709]] *[[:en:769|769]] *[[:en:829|829]] *[[:en:889|889]] *[[:en:949|949]] | *[[:en:1009|1009]] *[[:en:1069|1069]] *[[:en:1129|1129]] *[[:en:1189|1189]] *[[:en:1249|1249]] *[[:en:1309|1309]] *[[:en:1369|1369]] *[[:en:1429|1429]] *[[:en:1489|1489]] *[[:en:1549|1549]] *[[:en:1609|1609]] *[[:en:1669|1669]] *[[:en:1729|1729]] *[[:en:1789|1789]] *[[:en:1849|1849]] *[[:en:1909|1909]] *[[:en:1969|1969]] | *[[:en:2029|2029]] *[[:en:2089|2089]] *[[:en:2149|2149]] *[[:en:2209|2209]] *[[:en:2269|2269]] *[[:en:2329|2329]] *[[:en:2389|2389]] *[[:en:2449|2449]] *[[2509]] *[[2569]] *[[2629]] *[[2689]] *[[2749]] *[[2809]] *[[2869]] *[[:en:2929|2929]] *[[:en:2989|2989]] |} === Events === * The [[:en:Keichō|Keichō era]] 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.
==Months of Yin Earth Rooster== In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro (solar term)]] to the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Kanro]]).

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rooster also known as  Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr === Events ===
* The {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō era}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Kanro}}).

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rooster also known as  Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. '''Yin Earth Rooster also known as  Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr === Events ===
* The {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō era}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Kanro}}).

=== Events ===
* The {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō era}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Kanro}}).

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rooster also known as  Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|WD=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.

==Pronunciation==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rooster also known as  Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu

=== Events ===
* The {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō era|1=Keichō}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro (solar term)|1=Bailu (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Kanro|1=Hanlu}}).

=== Events ===
* The {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō era|1=Keichō}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro (solar term)|1=Bailu (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Kanro|1=Hanlu}}).

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rooster also known as  Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля === Events ===
* The {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō era|1=Keichō}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro (solar term)|1=Bailu (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Kanro|1=Hanlu}}).

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rooster also known as  Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|WD=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu

<!--

**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: つちのととり (tsuchinoto-tori)
***Onyomi: きかのとり (kika-no-tori)
***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu

-->
